name: Holiday Muffin Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup and level off.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and blend well.
3. Store in an airtight container at room temperature or in a cool, dry place.
4. For gift giving, measure out 2 cups of the mix (dipping a cup and leveling it off), and place in an airtight container or zipper-topped storage bag.
5. Include the recipe for Holiday Muffins:
- Holiday Muffins: 2 cups Holiday Muffin Mix, 2/3 cup water, 1 egg (slightly beaten), 1/4 cup oil
6. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Grease the bottoms of 12 muffin cups or line with paper baking cups.
8. In a medium bowl, combine the muffin mix, water, egg, and oil. Stir until the dry ingredients are just moistened; do not overmix.
9. Fill each greased muffin cup about 1/2 full.
10. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 to 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Immediately remove from the pan and serve warm. Makes 12 muffins.
